heading: Member User Group
label: 656 Member User Group
text: The Speaker of the House of Representatives, after consulting with the Minority Leader of the House, may appoint a Member User Group for the purpose of reviewing budgetary scorekeeping rules and practices of the House and advising the Speaker from time to time on the effect and impact of such rules and practices.
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior was renumbered section 405 and is classified to .section 406 of Pub. L. 93–344section 655 of this title
